title: Chapter Marker Rail
prompt: Create a production-ready Chapter Marker Rail using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original scroll effect puts a short, internally scrollable reading pane beside a numbered chapter rail that follows the reader’s position. Keep it compact and self-contained: use an #F4F5F6 stage, white 22px-radius panel, #111111 text, #4A4A4F copy, #ECECEE borders, and one violet active chapter marker. No gradients on the card, no full-page scroll listeners, and no fixed page-level elements. Use a real scrollable article region with an accessible name and three meaningful section headings; calculate the active chapter from the region’s own onScroll event using local state. The rail should expose the active chapter with aria-current=step and an aria-live polite concise update, while decorative motion is hidden from assistive technology. Use opacity and transform over 180ms ease-out for the marker and a spring around stiffness 300 damping 26 for its movement. Ensure keyboard users can focus and scroll the reading pane, labels remain legible at 320px, and the panel grows naturally for detail preview. Maintain AA contrast, logical tab order, and a soft shadow. Do not use network requests, remote assets, random values, browser storage, or timers. For prefers-reduced-motion, keep the marker stable at the computed chapter without travel. Return a full client component plus a pure CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:
1 Context
…
*/ .chapter-marker-rail{display:flex;gap:16px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.chapter-marker-rail nav{min-width:72px;font-weight:800}.chapter-marker-rail article{height:176px;overflow:auto;padding:16px;border-radius:16px;background:#f4f5f6;color:#4a4a4f}.chapter-marker-rail [aria-current=step]{color:#111}.chapter-marker-rail [aria-current=step]::before{display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;margin-right:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#a78bfa;content:""}.chapter-marker-rail article:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}
